channel.title: WorkSmart-AI News
channel.description: 🚀 Suitable for Startups, Small Business, Sass Websites, Professional Portfolios, Marketing Websites, Landing Pages & Blogs.

item.title: Staff AI Skills Training in Higher Education: What Actually Works in 2026
item.description: A practical look at what effective staff AI training in higher education needs to include: role-specific support, anxiety-aware design, and measurable outcomes.

item.title: Don’t Lose Your Voice to AI
item.description: A personal reflection on where AI can help with writing, where it can reduce anxiety, and why keeping a human voice still matters.

item.title: Presenting at AI South-West in Taunton
item.description: Reflections from AI South West Live in Taunton, where the biggest theme was clear: successful AI adoption starts with people, not tools.

item.title: Removing the Stranger from the Room
item.description: Why anxiety around AI is often a sign of unfamiliarity, and why universities need space for guidance, training, and honest conversations.

item.title: What Do We Gain? AI’s Value to the Workforce
item.description: A reflection on AI productivity gains, workforce value, and why universities should ask who benefits when technology frees up time.

item.title: Empowering Universities Through AI Training
item.description: Why meaningful AI adoption in universities depends on empowering staff and leaders with the knowledge, confidence, and involvement to shape decisions.

item.title: New HEPI Report: AI and the Future of Universities
item.description: A reflection on HEPI’s AI and universities report, and why institution-wide staff development needs to be treated as a strategic priority.
